label: 第215話
source_locator: 単行本24巻 目次 p.130
summary_short: 伏黒の魂が内側から宿儺の呪力出力を抑え、虎杖は戦い続ける。真希が合流して二人で宿儺を攻めるが、裏梅が現れて氷凝呪法で動きを封じる。
summary_full: 虎杖は宿儺の斬撃を受けながら接近し、そこへ真希が合流する。真希は伏黒の肉体ごと宿儺を殺してでも捕らえる方針を虎杖へ確認し、二人で宿儺へ連携攻撃を加える。宿儺の呪力出力は、伏黒の魂が仲間を傷つける際に抵抗することで一割以下まで低下していた。宿儺は肉体の主導権を完全に沈める必要を悟る。裏梅が現れて最大出力の霜凪で虎杖と真希を凍結し、宿儺を連れて立ち去る。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 恵 resists from within his body, and 真希 joins 悠仁 's side as well, giving him a fighting chance. Unbeknownst to any of the fighters, sorcerers draw closer to 宿儺 's location.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: Unharmed by 鵺, 真希 joins the fight. 悠仁 hits 宿儺 with a right cross thanks to 恵 hampering him from within. He can feel his 呪力 output fluctuating, and 恵 is holding him below ten percent at his lowest. 宿儺 knows he'll need to polish his vessel but remains confident he can kill 悠仁 regardless. However, 真希 suddenly appears to join the fight, surprising 宿儺. 真希 apologizes for being late and asks for a quick explanation. 宿儺 notices that 真希 wasn't damaged by 鵺 's haphazard attack and recognizes she's no small-fry. Still furious at 宿儺, 悠仁 tells 真希 that he won't die even if they kill him. The three of them engage in battle at high speeds, with 悠仁 and 真希 working together to bring down the King of Curses. 宿儺 is able to knock 悠仁 away, but 真希 overpowers him in a hand-to-hand combat exchange and sends him flying. 悠仁 restrains 宿儺's arms by wrapping a gate around him. 宿儺 tells 悠仁 that his approach is dull, and then 真希 kicks him into a wall. 宿儺 gets up, uninjured, and 真希 expresses how strange it is for 恵's body to be fighting so well. She wonders if 宿儺 would be able to heal wounds dealt by her 釈魂刀 with 反転術式 . Before they resume fighting, 真希 clarifies with 悠仁 that their goal is to stop 宿儺, even if it means killing 恵. Once 悠仁 confirms, 真希 warns him that things are going to speed up. 真希 and 悠仁 work together to bring down 宿儺. 悠仁, 真希, and 宿儺 ramp their speed up a notch and re-engage in flurries of hand-to-hand combat. The students both throw a feint to force 宿儺 into a mistimed block. 真希 capitalizes by swinging 悠仁 toward 宿儺, allowing 悠仁 to land a punch in their opponent's side. Both students follow up with a barrage of punches, but 宿儺 parries and deflects them all. 宿儺 deduces that his power is hampered the most when he targets 恵's friends. He circumvents this restriction by targetting the ground and activating 捌 : Spiderweb to destroy the ground beneath their feet. 真希 nearly lands an uppercut but loses her footing before her attack connects. 宿儺 capitalizes by landing a powerful punch across her face. However, 真希 quickly shakes it off, impressing the King of Curses. "FROST CALM" . The fighters continue to zip around at high speeds until 宿儺 eventually gets some distance. The battle is suddenly interrupted when everyone suddenly notices a nearby swell of 呪力. 裏梅 has appeared and they make themselves known by activating 霜凪 at it's maximum 呪力 output. This creates a large mass of ice that incases 悠仁 and 真希 without harming 宿儺. 悠仁 helpless to watch as 宿儺 escapes. 裏梅 joins 宿儺's side and apologizes for interfering. 宿儺 dismisses the interruption, and 裏梅 says they left 悠仁 mostly unfrozen just in case. 宿儺 clarifies that 悠仁 has served his purpose, and it doesn't matter what happens to him at this point. Even so, 宿儺 emphasizes it was the right move for 裏梅 to focus most of their attack on 真希. 宿儺 summons 鵺 and expresses that his form is still incomplete. He asks 裏梅 to ready the " 浴 ," but 裏梅 reveals it has already been prepared. 宿儺 compliments 裏梅 on their meticulousness, and they both get onto 鵺 and begin to fly away. 悠仁 breaks out of the ice and yells angrily for 宿儺, but he's bound to the ground as they fly away. 裏梅 asks 宿儺 if they should kill 悠仁, but the latter says to enjoy the view. They mock 悠仁's desperate look as 鵺 flies far out of reach while the young man can only helplessly watch.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 羂索 裏梅 虎杖悠仁 宿儺 伏黒恵 (言及のみ) 禪院真希
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 死滅回游 虎杖悠仁, 禪院真希 & 来栖華 vs. 宿儺 (終了) 虎杖悠仁, 禪院真希 & 来栖華 vs. 宿儺 (終了)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪具 釈魂刀 羂索の術式 呪霊操術 宿儺の術式 十種影法術 術式 (恵経由) 鵺 御廚子 捌「蜘蛛の糸」 裏梅の術式 氷凝呪法 霜凪 霜凪

key_events_verified_phase10: 真希が虎杖と合流して宿儺と戦う
伏黒の魂が宿儺の呪力出力を抑える
虎杖と真希が出力低下した宿儺を追い詰める
裏梅が霜凪で二人を凍結する
宿儺と裏梅が浴の準備へ向かう
verification_notes_phase10: 集英社公式21～24巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別／話別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第十段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
